name: OpenDungeon Classic
description: A grounded fantasy world where magic exists but is rare and dangerous. Heroes are mortal, resources are scarce, and the wilderness holds ancient secrets.
tone: grounded fantasy — sensory, concise, keep momentum
magicSystem: Magic exists but is uncommon and often dangerous. Most people live their whole lives without witnessing true magic. Spellcasters are rare and often feared or revered. Magic items are legendary artifacts, not common loot.
taboos: No divine intervention or omnipotent gods

custom.currency: Gold pieces, silver marks, copper commons
custom.commonRaces: Humans are dominant. Dwarves live in mountain holds. Elves are rare and reclusive.
custom.worldFeel: The world is old. Civilizations have risen and fallen. Ruins dot the landscape.
custom.death: Death is permanent and meaningful. The world is dangerous but not unfair.
